title: What Winning the Phone War Actually Looks Like
caption:
Willpower is not a strategy. It's a resource — and it runs out.

The man who beats his phone with willpower alone is back on the phone by Thursday. The man who wins has a war strategy: hard rules, honest self-inventory, replacement disciplines, and a brother who asks the hard question.

"If by the Spirit you put to death the deeds of the body, you will live." — Romans 8:13

Save this and put one of these in place today.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #phonefasting #selfcontrol #godlymen #manofgod #christianity #scripture
